question.label: Energy read
question.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
question.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

answer: Mentoring has been one place where I still feel useful.

assessment.note: Mentoring is a concrete thread but this answer pivots off the wellbeing question, so no wellbeing signal is scored; also reveals a growth thread worth following.

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
